ddls:
CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "project_description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the project was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the project was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, data analyst, project manager) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_project_access" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the users table */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the projects table */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the user to the project (e.g., read-only, read-write) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "technical_parameters" (
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter entry */,
  "w_low" REAL /* Lower bound for the weight */,
  "w_high" REAL /* Upper bound for the weight */,
  "width" REAL /* Width of the component */,
  "bval" REAL /* Baseline value for the parameter */,
  "qsthr" REAL /* Quality threshold for the parameter */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project to which the parameter belongs */,
  "parameter_type" TEXT /* Type of the parameter (e.g., weight, width, baseline) */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement (e.g., kg, cm, N) */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the parameter */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the parameter was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the parameter was last updated */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the parameter */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the users table (created by) */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the users table (updated by) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parameter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parameter_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version entry */,
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the technical_parameters table */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "changes" TEXT /* Description of changes made to the parameter */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the users table (created by) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaborations" (
  "collaboration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration entry */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the projects table */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the users table */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the collaboration (e.g., owner, contributor) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the collaboration was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the collaboration was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaboration_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report entry */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the projects table */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Data contained in the report */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the users table (created by) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)
